STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_GNAW_BITE.title: Gnaw
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_HOLLOW_DEBT.title: Hollow Debt
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_HOLLOW_DEBT.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Heal HP equal to unblocked damage dealt. Add *Beckon* to your hand until it is full. Shuffle 3 *Beckon* into your Draw pile and 3 into your Discard pile. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_MALICE_SPREAD.title: Malice Spread
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_MALICE_SPREAD.descri: Apply X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_VEILED_FORM.title: Veiled Form
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_VEILED_FORM.descript:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all other cards in hand. Take an extra turn. Draw 1 fewer card each turn.{IfUpgraded:show:
At the start of your next turn, draw 2 additional cards.|}
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_PLAGUE_RESONANCE.des: This turn, lose {StatLoss:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] and {StatLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. ALL enemies gain {StatLoss:diff()} [gold]Artifact[/gold]. Gain {GainEnergy:energyIcons()}.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_SERPENT_ARRAY.title: Serpent Array
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_SERPENT_ARRAY.descri: Apply {PoisonStacks:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} times.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_PRACTICE_PERFECT.des: [gold]Innate[/gold]. For this combat, upgrade every *Sovereign Blade* in your deck.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_BLOSSOM_BLADES.title: Blossom of Blades
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_BLOSSOM_BLADES.descr: Choose a *Sovereign Blade* in hand. Transform it into *Regent's Dagger*: deal 9 damage per hit; +1 hit per 10 base damage on the blade. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_FORGE_CHORUS.title: Forge Chorus
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_REQUIEM_CARD.title: Requiem
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_REQUIEM_CARD.descrip: Whenever you play a card that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more, gain {RequiemGain:energyIcons()}.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_DREAM_RETURN.title: Dream Return
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_DREAM_RETURN.descrip:
[gold]Summon[/gold] {Summon:diff()}. Return every [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card from your discard to your hand; those cards cost 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.{IfUpgraded:show:|
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].}
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_UNDERWORLD_DRAW.desc: Choose X cards from your [gold]Exhaust[/gold] pile and add them to your {IfUpgraded:show:hand|discard pile}. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_WINTER_SLAM.title: Winter Slam
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_WINTER_SLAM.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each [gold]Frost[/gold] orb you successfully [gold]Channeled[/gold] this combat, this hits one additional time (orbs need not remain in slots).{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_LEARNING_JOY.title: Learning Is Joy
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_LEARNING_JOY.descrip: Choose 1 of up to 3 [gold]upgraded Power[/gold] cards from other characters; add it to your hand. It costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} until played this turn. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_BOOT_SEQUENCE.title: Quiet, Still Booting
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_BOOT_SEQUENCE.descri:
Gain {IfUpgraded:show:5|3}X [gold]Block[/gold]. Choose up to X cards in hand; they gain [gold]Retain[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].)|}
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_POST_COMBAT_TREATMEN: At the end of combat, heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_MANIPULATION_REALITY: For this combat, cards you add during combat are [gold]Upgraded[/gold] if they can be.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_HEAVEN_GIFT_CARD.des:
[gold]Ethereal[/gold]. Lose 3 [gold]Gold[/gold]. At the end of combat, gain {IfUpgraded:show:7|5}X [gold]Gold[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedGold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold] at end of combat.)|}
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_SNAKE_ELO_CARD.title: Snakebite ELO
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_SNAKE_ELO_CARD.descr: Transform all [gold]Attack[/gold] cards into *Snake Bite*. When you win this combat, gain an extra card reward pick (same pool and 3 choices as a normal combat reward).
